title: Soft Touch Baby Boys Girls Rosebud Fleece Blanket Wrap Shawl Satin Trim & Fleece Back FBP66 (Sky Blue)
features: Baby Boys Girls Rosebud Wrap / Blanket
Colour: As Image (Colour May Be Slightly Different From Image)
description: Product Description Soft Touch Rose-Bud Blanket, Available in Sizes for Infants, Children & Adults. About Soft Touch We are a long-established, well recognised brand of babywear and baby accessories. All Soft Touch Products are beautifully packaged and can be easily identified by our distinctive designs and branding found on the labels. Our current product range includes: Shoes, Socks & Tights Baby Bibs, Bodysuits and Garment Sets Hats, Headbands and Headwear Accessories Hooded Wraps, Blankets & Robes Baby Accessories We also provide a variety of Christmas & Christening items, as well as a selection of easily customisable Plain Items. Product Details Key Features Machine Washable at 30 Degrees Celcius Features a Stunning Rose-Bud Design Satin Trim colour-matched to the blanket 100% Polyester Composition Super Comfy Fabric Available in 2 sizes: Adult size (FBP67) - 200cm x 150cm Children Size (FBP66) - 75cm x 100cm Available in Multiple Stunning Colours: Blue Grey Pink Lemon Red Rose Gold White Adult size only available in Blue, Pink & Grey Bubble / Dimple Style Blanket Also Available Adult Size fits easily over a King Size Bed The adult size blanket is 200cm Long and 150cm Wide, making it perfect to cover a large king-size bed, use as a Sofa Throw, or just to snuggle up inside. The children's size blanket is perfect for use in a cot, single bed, pram, or on a chair / sofa You Might Also Like... Our Adorable Dimple pattern Blanket Available in Both Adults and Childrens Sizes, this blanket has a stunning and comfy bubble design.
